canonical_equation_refs.name: MLX/PyTorch full-decoder downstream scorer drift propagation
canonical_equation_refs.one_line_summary: PR95-class MLX/PyTorch decoder drift is bounded below local scorer precision only as macOS-MLX research signal.

evidence_boundary.next_gate: materialize selected byte-shaving operations, run local controls, then submit only byte-closed packets to exact auth eval
